revision.text:
{{sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Japanese Buddhism | class = hlist | pretitle = Part of a series on | title = [[Buddhism in Japan]] | image = [[File:230128 Kamakura Daibutsu Japan04s3.jpg|200px]] | listtitlestyle = text-align: center
| list1title = Schools | list1name = Schools | list1 = * [[Satyasiddhi|Jōjitsu]] * [[Hosso]] * [[Sanron]] * [[Kegon]] * [[Risshū (Buddhism)|Ritsu]] * [[Kusha-shū (Buddhism)|Kusha]] * [[Tendai]] * [[Shingon]] * [[Jōdo-shū]] * [[Jōdo Shinshū]] * [[Rinzai school|Rinzai]] * [[Sōtō]] * [[Nichiren Buddhism|Nichiren]] * [[Ōbaku]] * [[Fuke-shū]] * [[Shugendō|Shugendo]] * [[Japanese new religions]] * [[Buddhism_in_the_United_States#Zen|Zen in the US]]
| list2title = Key figures | list2name = Key figures | list2 = * [[Prince Shōtoku|Shōtoku]] * [[Tori Busshi]] * [[Rōben]] * [[Saichō]] * [[Kūkai]] * [[Jōchō]] * [[Kūya]] * [[En no Gyōja]] * [[Hōnen]] * [[Myōe]] * [[Shinran]] * [[Jōkei (monk)|Jōkei]] * [[Eison]] * [[Ninshō]] * [[Dōgen]] * [[Eisai]] * [[Ingen]] * [[Nichiren]] * [[Unkei]] * [[Enni]] * [[Yishan Yining|Issan Ichinei]] * [[Musō Soseki]] * [[Sen no Rikyū]] * [[Rennyo]] * [[Sesshū Tōyō]] * [[Takuan Sōhō]] * [[Ingen]] * [[Hasegawa Tōhaku]] * [[Anrakuan Sakuden|Sakuden]] * [[Tenkai]] * [[Inoue Enryō]] * [[Senshō Murakami|Murakami Senshō]] * [[Kitaro Nishida|Nishida Kitarō]] * [[Soyen Shaku|Shaku Sōen]] * [[D. T. Suzuki]] * [[Shunryū Suzuki|Suzuki Shunryū]]
| list3title = Key topics | list3name = Key topics | list3 = * [[Nihon Shoki]] * [[Buddhist art in Japan|Art]] * [[Japanese Buddhist pantheon|Deities]] * [[Japanese Buddhist architecture|Architecture]] * [[Buddhist temples in Japan|Temples]] * [[Hongaku]] * [[Honji suijaku]] * [[Shinbutsu-shūgō]] * [[Gongen]] * [[Nianfo|Nenbutsu]] * [[Death poem]] * [[Japanese rock garden|Zen garden]] * [[Zazen]] * [[Namu Myōhō Renge Kyō|Daimoku]] * [[Sōhei]] * [[Ikkō-ikki]] * [[Butsudan]] * [[Bon Festival|Obon]] * [[Kaichō]] * [[Kanjin]] * [[Senjafuda]] * [[Danka system]] * [[Shinbutsu bunri]] * [[Haibutsu kishaku]] * [[Literature of the Five Mountains|Gozan Bungaku]]
| below = * [[Glossary of Japanese Buddhism]]
}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- place categories on the /doc sub-page, not here --></noinclude>

{{sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Japanese Buddhism | class = hlist | pretitle = Part of a series on | title = [[Buddhism in Japan]] | image = [[File:230128 Kamakura Daibutsu Japan04s3.jpg|200px]] | listtitlestyle = text-align: center
| list1title = Schools | list1name = Schools | list1 = * [[Satyasiddhi|Jōjitsu]] * [[Hosso]] * [[Sanron]] * [[Kegon]] * [[Risshū (Buddhism)|Ritsu]] * [[Kusha-shū (Buddhism)|Kusha]] * [[Tendai]] * [[Shingon]] * [[Jōdo-shū]] * [[Jōdo Shinshū]] * [[Rinzai school|Rinzai]] * [[Sōtō]] * [[Nichiren Buddhism|Nichiren]] * [[Ōbaku]] * [[Fuke-shū]] * [[Shugendō|Shugendo]] * [[Japanese new religions]] * [[Buddhism_in_the_United_States#Zen|Zen in the US]]
| list2title = Key figures | list2name = Key figures | list2 = * [[Prince Shōtoku|Shōtoku]] * [[Tori Busshi]] * [[Rōben]] * [[Saichō]] * [[Kūkai]] * [[Jōchō]] * [[Kūya]] * [[En no Gyōja]] * [[Hōnen]] * [[Myōe]] * [[Shinran]] * [[Jōkei (monk)|Jōkei]] * [[Eison]] * [[Ninshō]] * [[Dōgen]] * [[Eisai]] * [[Ingen]] * [[Nichiren]] * [[Unkei]] * [[Enni]] * [[Yishan Yining|Issan Ichinei]] * [[Musō Soseki]] * [[Sen no Rikyū]] * [[Rennyo]] * [[Sesshū Tōyō]] * [[Takuan Sōhō]] * [[Ingen]] * [[Hasegawa Tōhaku]] * [[Anrakuan Sakuden|Sakuden]] * [[Tenkai]] * [[Inoue Enryō]] * [[Senshō Murakami|Murakami Senshō]] * [[Kitaro Nishida|Nishida Kitarō]] * [[Soyen Shaku|Shaku Sōen]] * [[D. T. Suzuki]] * [[Shunryū Suzuki|Suzuki Shunryū]]
| list3title = Key topics | list3name = Key topics | list3 = * [[Nihon Shoki]] * [[Buddhist art in Japan|Art]] * [[Japanese Buddhist pantheon|Deities]] * [[Japanese Buddhist architecture|Architecture]] * [[Buddhist temples in Japan|Temples]] * [[Hongaku]] * [[Honji suijaku]] * [[Shinbutsu-shūgō]] * [[Gongen]] * [[Nianfo|Nenbutsu]] * [[Death poem]] * [[Japanese rock garden|Zen garden]] * [[Zazen]] * [[Namu Myōhō Renge Kyō|Daimoku]] * [[Sōhei]] * [[Ikkō-ikki]] * [[Butsudan]] * [[Bon Festival|Obon]] * [[Kaichō]] * [[Kanjin]] * [[Senjafuda]] * [[Danka system]] * [[Shinbutsu bunri]] * [[Haibutsu kishaku]] * [[Literature of the Five Mountains|Gozan Bungaku]]
| below = * [[Glossary of Japanese Buddhism]]
}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- place categories on the /doc sub-page, not here --></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
